_comment: Machine-readable progress state for E677 exploration. Agents MUST read this before acting and update it after completing any step.

T1_lemma_verification.description: Run proof_candidates.py to verify L1/L2/L3 on all 439+ DB models.
T1_lemma_verification.notes: L1=0, L2=0, L3=0 failures. All lemmas hold on every DB model.

T2_identity_extraction.description: Run extract_identities.py depth 4, then depth 5 if tractable.
T2_identity_extraction.notes: Depth-4 and depth-5 completed. Total sampled identities: 20.

T3_cascade_d7.description: Prover9 cascade-gap refutation for all C(7,2)=21 collision pairs at orbit period d=7.
T3_cascade_d7.notes: Open pairs cluster around indices 3 (c_{d-4}) and 6 (c_{d-1}). Pattern: c_{d-4} is the squaring anchor; c_{d-1} is the orbit predecessor of c_0=x.

T4_cascade_d7_augmented.description: Re-run 7 open d=7 pairs with additional axioms from T2 (depth-4/5 identities).
T4_cascade_d7_augmented.notes: Key idea: non-equational identities from finiteness provide extra constraints that close the gap.

T5_cascade_d6.description: Generate and run cascade-gap for d=6: C(6,2)=15 pairs.
T5_cascade_d6.notes: Smaller period may be fully closable.

T6_cascade_d5.description: Generate and run cascade-gap for d=5: C(5,2)=10 pairs.
T6_cascade_d5.notes: d=5 is the minimum for L2 anchor. If all 10 close, d=5 d-injectivity is proved.

T7_intermediate_atp.description: Attack intermediate equation chain: E677 => E52930, E677 => E406197, E677+E406197 => E255.
T7_intermediate_atp.notes: These are direct Prover9 attacks. If any succeeds, it's a genuine theorem.

T8_cascade_general.description: After d=5,6,7 are done, analyze pattern and attempt general-d argument.
T8_cascade_general.notes: If all small d are fully closable, the structural pattern may yield a general proof.

FALSE_TRACK._comment: Searching for a finite E677-magma that violates E255 (d-injectivity fails).

F1_dpll_search.description: Run orbit_anti255_dpll (Rust) for small n: cargo run --release -- anti255 2
F1_dpll_search.notes: Completed through n=18 with no counterexample. Thread cap=unbounded.

F2_mace4_direct.description: Use Mace4 to search for E677 + Â¬E255 models directly.
F2_mace4_direct.command: Create anti255-direct.in with E677 as axiom + E255 negation as goal, run Mace4.
F2_mace4_direct.notes: No E677+¬E255 model found for n ≤ 14. Results: {2: 'EXHAUSTED', 3: 'EXHAUSTED', 4: 'EXHAUSTED', 5: 'EXHAUSTED', 6: 'EXHAUSTED', 7: 'HARD_TIMEOUT', 8: 'HARD_TIMEOUT', 9: 'HARD_TIMEOUT', 10: 'TIMEOUT', 11: 'HARD_TIMEOUT', 12: 'TIMEOUT', 13: 'TIMEOUT', 14: 'HARD_TIMEOUT'}

F3_fiber_extensions.description: Color-extension constructions over DB bases, anti-255 mode.
F3_fiber_extensions.notes: Completed bases: ['7/0', '9/0']. Pending: ['29/0 (3 colorings)', '11/0', '13/0']. Manual config needed for new bases.

F4_construction_audit.description: Run construction audit (A1-A6) from proof_candidates.py to identify live attack vectors.
F4_construction_audit.result:
CONSTRUCTION FAMILY AUDIT  (A1â€“A6 attack directions)
================================================================================

  [~] A1: Piecewise linear extension (vanishing c/d)
      Code:   color-extensions.py (affine only), color-extensions-nonlinear.py (full table)
      Status: PARTIAL
      Gap:    Vanishing c_{x,y}/d_{x,y} mode not implemented. Only full-table or affine.
      Next:   Add vanishing-coefficient mode to color-extensions.py for targeted piecewise search.

  [~] A2: Partial model composition (core + add-ons)
      Code:   src/c_dpll/ (c_complete, c_complete_extended)
      Status: PARTIAL
      Gap:    c_complete exists but NOT wired to anti-255 constraints.
      Next:   Add anti255 filter to c_dpll submit_model (like eq_dpll has).

  [âœ“] A3: Rudi's 2-coloring + non-affine fibers
      Code:   color-extensions-nonlinear.py (anti255 mode)
      Status: LIVE
      Gap:    Only bases 7/0 and 9/0 implemented. 29/0 (3 colorings) not added.
      Next:   Add magmadef for 29/0 with its three 2-colorings.

  [âœ—] A4: Block design mixed constructions (GDD)
      Code:   NONE
      Status: CONCEPTUAL
      Gap:    No implementation. Would need GDD construction + mixed fiber ops.
      Next:   Low priority â€” Bruno's closure argument suggests 255 stays in blocks.

  [Â·] A5: Non-abelian group constructions (exponent 5)
      Code:   linear.sage (abelian groups only)
      Status: MINIMAL
      Gap:    Only abelian exhaustive search. No non-abelian or exponent-5 specific code.
      Next:   Implement f(x)Â·y^bÂ·g(x) Ansatz over (Z/5Z)^k groups.

  [âœ“] A6: Free algebra quotient (Zoltan's approach)
      Code:   src/one_orbit2.rs (term rewriting branch-and-bound)
      Status: LIVE
      Gap:    Runs but does not check finiteness of computed quotient.
      Next:   Add quotient size detection + E255 check on completion.

  Priority ranking for counterexample work:
    1. A3 (LIVE) â€” add 29/0 base, run anti255 mode
    2. A1 (PARTIAL) â€” vanishing-coefficient piecewise extension
    3. A2 (PARTIAL) â€” wire anti255 into c_dpll
    4. A6 (LIVE) â€” add finiteness/E255 detection to one_orbit2
    5. A5 (MINIMAL) â€” non-abelian group Ansatz (new code needed)
    6. A4 (CONCEPTUAL) â€” block design (deprioritized)
================================================================================
F4_construction_audit.notes: A1-A6 audit: 4 LIVE, 4 PARTIAL, 2 CONCEPTUAL attack vectors.

F5_mace4_open_pairs.description: Mace4 countermodel search on the 7 open d=7 collision pairs.
F5_mace4_open_pairs.result: ALL 7 TIMEOUT at nâ‰¤20, t=30s. No models found.
F5_mace4_open_pairs.notes: Suggests these collisions are genuinely impossible (proving TRUE), not that FALSE models exist.
